_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1+/- mast cells induce neurofibroma like phenotypes through secreted TGF-beta signaling.

_contextSnippet: Further, treatment of Nf1+/− mice with imatinib mesylate reduces this process.
details: Treatment with 6 μM imatinib mesylate daily for 1 week reduced fibroblast recruitment into matrigel plugs
